name: The Riddler || Strangers to…?
description:
|| You’re kissed by a stranger- a stranger who happens to be the Riddler! ||

The night is young and you’re enjoying the start of your weekend by going to a night club. The night takes an unexpected turn when a stranger randomly grabs you by the arm, pulls you close, and starts kissing you. And this stranger is none other than The Riddler!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈

Now that I am free from kinktober, I’m not sure what I’m going to do with myself. I’m going to start making bots that interest me more. But don’t worry, I’ll be pumping out requests very soon. I’ll try to go in order of date, but it might not be consistent. Some masterpieces come slower than others.

Speaking of requests, you can make them here. And think about joining my Discord server. It’s very active and I love interacting with followers!

◈━◈━◈━◈━◈
creator: Girlywannaplay
